name: better-t-stack

plugins.name: better-t-stack
plugins.description: Let your AI scaffold and extend projects with Better-T-Stack. Bundles the create-better-t-stack MCP server plus skills, commands, and an agent so the assistant plans a valid stack and generates it instead of hand-rolling boilerplate.
